items.title: Migration applies; project_editor_state table exists
items.expected: Batch runs 4 migrations; table has id, project_id (unique FK), open_paths jsonb, active_path, timestamps.
items.evidence: Migrated (Batch 1 run: 4 migrations); columns verified: id, project_id, open_paths jsonb, active_path, created_at, updated_at.

items.title: Projects sync from disk via /api/projects
items.precondition: Backend on :1240, PROJECTS_ROOT pointed at real projects.
items.expected: Returns Vision + puzzlepulse with real on-disk paths.
items.evidence: GET /api/projects -> success true, projects [1 Vision, 2 puzzlepulse].

items.title: Directory tree lists lazily and hides .git/node_modules
items.expected: One level of entries, dirs first; no .git or node_modules.
items.evidence: Returned .claude, plans, vision-backend, vision-frontend (dirs) then files; no .git/node_modules.

items.title: File read returns text content + kind
items.evidence: GET file README.md -> success true, kind text, 341 bytes.

items.title: Raw stream sets correct Content-Type (incl text/html for HTML)
items.evidence: raw .html -> Content-Type text/html; charset=utf-8; inline. (octet-stream default for unmapped types.)

items.title: Save writes text to disk (round-trip)
items.expected: File written verbatim to the project directory.
items.evidence: POST save -> success; read-back matched written content; on-disk file confirmed; temp file cleaned up.

items.title: Path traversal and absolute paths are rejected (read)
items.expected: Both rejected with EDITOR_PATH_FORBIDDEN; no file contents leaked.

items.title: Symlink escape is blocked at read/write time
items.precondition: Vision contains symlinked-in config (CLAUDE.md -> outside root).
items.evidence: Symlinked CLAUDE.md resolved outside root and was rejected (EDITOR_PATH_OUTSIDE_ROOT). KNOWN TRADEOFF: injected config can't be opened in the editor yet.

items.title: Editor state persists per project (and guard holds)
steps: 1. PUT /api/editor/state with openPaths incl a symlinked file
items.expected: Saves and reads back; lexical guard still rejects absolute/.. paths.
items.evidence: PUT/GET round-trip returned the saved openPaths+activePath (incl CLAUDE.md bookmark); ../../etc/passwd rejected EDITOR_PATH_FORBIDDEN.

items.title: Frontend builds with Monaco workers bundled offline; backend tests pass
steps: 2. backend npm test + npm run typecheck
items.expected: Build succeeds, Monaco split into lazy chunk + 5 self-hosted workers; 33 backend tests pass; tsc clean both trees.
items.evidence: Build OK (main 620kB, CodeEditorView 3.45MB lazy chunk, ts/css/html/json mode workers emitted, no CDN). Backend 33/33 tests pass; tsc clean BE+FE.

items.title: Files icon opens the editor takeover; back arrow returns to sessions
steps: 1. In Sessions, click the code icon next to + on a project
2. confirm the left rail becomes a file tree with project name + back arrow
items.expected: Editor takeover appears; back arrow restores the session list.

items.title: Open text files in tabs with syntax highlighting + Emmet
items.precondition: Editor open on a project (e.g. vision-backend has .ts/.json).
steps: 3. in an HTML/JSX file type 'div>ul>li' + Tab (Emmet)
items.expected: Tabs open with correct highlighting; Emmet expands abbreviations.

items.title: Edit + save; dirty-close confirmation
steps: 1. edit content (tab shows a dirty dot)
3. open a new dirty tab and click its x
items.expected: Save writes to disk (toast); closing a dirty tab prompts to discard.
items.notes: Backend save verified via API (T2e); UI flow awaits manual run.

items.title: Image + PDF viewers; HTML code/page toggle
items.precondition: A project containing a png and a pdf (or add one), and an html file.
items.expected: Image renders; PDF renders; HTML switches between Monaco code and a rendered page (iframe).
items.notes: raw content-types verified via API (T2d); UI rendering awaits manual run.

items.title: Open tabs persist across an app reload
steps: 3. reopen the editor for that project
items.expected: Previously open tabs + active tab reappear.
items.notes: State API persistence verified (T3); UI hydration awaits manual run.
